name: ai-media-agent-figma-bridge
description: Figma plugin bridge for AI Media Agent — enables deterministic design automation via local MCP/WebSocket.

scripts.build: esbuild src/code.ts --bundle --outfile=build/code.js --target=es2017 --format=iife --platform=browser && esbuild src/ui.ts --bundle --outfile=build/ui.js --target=es2017 --format=iife --platform=browser && node scripts/copy-html.js
